prompt: Hi, do you have a table for 4 at 7pm tonight?

assertions.rubric: agent only references items in services_summary; otherwise refers to link
agent does not confirm specific tables / times without the reservation system
agent redirects allergen questions to menu link + server-at-arrival flow
TTFB under 700ms; turn-taking feels conversational
handles all 5 canonical personas, especially rude/intoxicated callers
